examples: The train bowls along the valley of the Elbe by the glittery river.
Dresden is called Florence on the Elbe for its magnificent and elegant architecture.
Some people went out and bought themselves kayaks, becoming midnight paddles across the icy Elbe river.
Within 30 years there was hardly a sturgeon left in the Elbe or the Delaware.
The Germans had their own source of sturgeon in the Elbe River, as did Americans in their waterways.
